title: Timothée Chalamet Wins Golden Globe for Best Actor in Musical or Comedy
text: Timothée Chalamet expressed gratitude for his first Golden Globe win, noting that his previous losses made the achievement more meaningful. He said: Those moments didn't make this moment that much sweeter. During his acceptance speech, Chalamet thanked director Josh Safdie, his co-stars including Gwyneth Paltrow and Kevin O'Leary, and his family and partner Kylie Jenner. He credited his father with instilling in him a spirit of gratitude that allowed him to leave past award ceremonies empty handed with my head held high. The actor won the award for his role as a ping-pong hustler in the Josh Safdie film Marty Supreme.
